services.description: Health check. Returns server status and full service catalog.
Initialize the server with Mattermost connection details. Must be called before any endpoint that interacts with Mattermost.
Responds to interactive message menu actions. When action is 'do_something', returns an ephemeral message with the selected option.
Opens the full interactive dialog (all element types: text, email, number, password, textarea, user/channel/option selectors, radio, boolean).
Opens a dialog with no form elements — just title, icon, and submit button.
Opens a dialog with user selector and channel selector elements.
Opens a dialog with a single boolean (checkbox) element.
Opens a dialog with multiselect option selector, multiselect user selector, and single select for comparison. Pass ?includeDefaults=true to pre-select default values.
Opens a dialog with dynamic select elements that load options from /dynamic-select-source.
Returns filtered options for dynamic select elements. Provides a list of engineering roles, filtered by the search query.
Opens a dialog that demonstrates field refresh — selecting a project type dynamically adds relevant fields (framework, platform, or language).
Opens a 3-step dialog wizard. Step 1: personal info. Submission advances to step 2 (work info), then step 3 (final details).
Returns an updated form definition based on project type selection. Used as the source_url for field refresh dialogs.
Handles all dialog form submissions. For multistep dialogs, returns the next step form. For regular/field-refresh dialogs, posts a confirmation message to the channel via sysadmin.
Opens a datetime dialog. The subcommand in body.text selects the variant: 'basic', 'mindate', 'interval', 'relative', 'timezone-manual', or default (date + datetime).
Handles datetime dialog submissions. Posts a confirmation message to the channel with submitted datetime values.
Returns a Slack-compatible ephemeral response with optional skip_slack_parsing flag.
Sends a message with extra_responses to a specific channel. Optionally sets a custom message type via ?type= query param.
Responds to an outgoing webhook trigger. Returns a formatted message showing the received payload and any overrides.
Stores OAuth2 app credentials for subsequent OAuth flow. Must be called before /start-oauth.
Redirects to the Mattermost OAuth2 authorization page. Requires /send-oauth-credentials to be called first.
OAuth2 callback. Exchanges the authorization code for an access token and stores it for /post-oauth-message.
Posts a message to Mattermost using the OAuth2 access token obtained from the /start-oauth -> /complete-oauth flow.
